A unique sense of privacy has been created here, with walkways leading through groves of mature trees, gardens of wildflowers and plenty of space to roam. Make this Pt. Dume paradise your own.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/31444-B.description: This ultimate beachfront retreat is set on the only sandy beach in Malibu where the gentle slope creates exceptionally approachable waves breaking far off from shore. The view from this home is one of the best in Southern California and can be appreciated from the approx. 2500 square foot great room living area or the extraordinarily spacious beachfront deck adjoining the living area ( or the expansive master bedroom deck) which showcases the wide sandy beach, Lechuza Point with pristine cove and rock formations, and a coveted surf break The tastefully remodeled kitchen offers substantial storage and amenities not found in most beach homes. Lounge in the 1400+ square foot oceanfront three-room master suite with vaulted ceilings, private fireplace retreat, spa-style bath area, large deck, gym area, and multiple closets. Two more spacious ocean-view suites are featured in the main residence, with three detached guest suites. This is also one of the rare beach homes in Malibu that is connected to a sewer treatment facility, not septic system. This property has excellent investment potential as a seasonal rental, and additional features include an elevator, courtyard spa, three-car garage, and off-street parking. REST4Plans measured the home at 8,072 total square feet under roof, making it one of the largest homes on Broad Beach on a single 50 foot lot. Rare and remarkable.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/6861-Wi.description: A Point Dume beauty that blends West and East Coast together, perfectly. A naturally modern take on a traditional craftsman with Little Dume beach access. This house is immaculate, gracious in size and has an outdoor area that is romantic and soulful. The entire property is incredibly private and the outdoor space was created for entertaining. The landscaped grounds have been expertly curated integrating the pool and decks thoughtfully. Teak floors and expansive decks throughout. High end everything, ceilings that soar and views that are private and beautiful.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/22102-P.description: This exceptional 0.29-acre parcel on Malibu's coveted Carbon Beachknown as Billionaire's Beachis a rare offering with 60 feet of prime ocean frontage. Formerly home to Carbon Oasis, a five-bedroom, five-and-a-half-bath, 4,850-square-foot residence, the property was tragically lost in the Palisades Fire. Today, it presents a blank slate for a discerning buyer to reimagine the site into a bespoke coastal retreat. Reminiscent of an Aman-inspired spa retreat with a modern twist, the residence is designed as a waterfront oasis influenced by the worldly travels of its developer. A lush green wall facade welcomes guests upon entry, curating a glimpse into the Zen wonderland tucked behind closed doors. Unobstructed panoramic views of the Pacific Ocean are on display in nearly every room, with custom champagne-toned glass sliders by industry leader Styline blending indoors and outdoors. Every inch of the elegant living and entertainment spaces is thoughtfully crafted and covered from floor to ceiling with organic materials, including limestone flooring and walls clad in Onyx, split face travertine, and roman clay plaster finish, while the bedrooms are dawned in parquet walnut wood. A central interior pond designed by the world-renowned Danny Wang features a lush garden with a statement tree and a linear outdoor fireplace by Montigo designed to inspire peace and tranquility. Half a million dollars' worth of Eggersmann cabinetry is customized in the kitchen, closets, and laundry room. The gourmet chef's kitchen boasts Miele appliances plus a bar draped in exotic materials. The second-floor principal suite showcases those coveted Pacific Ocean views and offers dual closets, the owner's bathroom adorned in onyx and split face travertine plus a sunlight infrared sauna. Additional luxurious amenities and features within the state-of-the-art smart home include a Josh. ai speaker-controlled system, fitness room, custom glass wine vault, planned cantilever hot tub, and a guest cottage with two bedrooms and two bathrooms. Outdoors, find 60 feet of beachfront and views stretching from Palos Verdes to the Malibu Pier, along with an outdoor summer kitchen covered in Ipe wood, sub-zero, and wolf appliances. Billionaire's Beach is Malibu's most prestigious address and home to only about 70 lots with current and past high-profile owners. Ideally located, the residence is a short distance to Malibu hot spots, including Nobu and Soho House.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/31008-B.description: Oceanfront perfection awaits on Malibu's Broad Beach. Exquisitely remodeled in 2023, this modern California bungalow is perfectly situated on a quiet, sandy section of Eastern Broad Beach with ~40 feet of frontage. Behind the gated entry, you are welcomed by a lush, tropical courtyard with mature trees and a bubbling fountain. A beautiful brick Italian bistro barbecue area offers a fireplace, built-in BBQ, and plentiful seating for entertaining on warm summer nights. Inside, the home is flooded with natural light and offers sweeping ocean views through oversized windows. An updated kitchen boasts a breakfast bar with a Viking range and Sub-Zero refrigerator. The casual layout flows seamlessly from a dining area into the beachfront living room which features a casual lounge, wet bar, fireplace, secondary dining area, and media den. There are two entry level bedroom suites, one of which offers separate outdoor access. The upper level is dedicated to the primary suite with whitewater and ocean views, a comfortable seating area, two desks, new wood floors, and a private outdoor deck overlooking the coastline. An expansive newly constructed beachfront deck features a partially enclosed dining area for protection from wind and evening dew, and leads to a private beach area with a firepit and hot tub. Sandy dunes with native ice plants offer privacy and a high seating area just above the surf and sand. Additional features include an outdoor shower, a separate laundry room, and plentiful off-street parking. With a premiere location on one of Malibu's most desirable sandy beaches, this legacy property offers the ultimate coastal escape.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/7145-Fe.description: Gorgeous Point Dume Spanish villa with Riviera 3 beach key on a gated garden sanctuary of approx. 1.6 acres. Elegance, warmth, exposed-beam ceilings, hardwood and Saltillo tile floors, exquisite tilework, lush grounds, fruit trees, a large lawn, and numerous patios for intimate and grand-scale gatherings. Serene living room with fireplace and wide picture windows flows into a chandelier dining room with tray ceiling and built-in cabinets. The gourmet country kitchen has a high, sloped ceiling, skylight, walnut hardwood floors, high-end appliances, butcher block island, copper countertops, breakfast area, and beautiful tile work. The family room has a rustic stone fireplace, French doors to a shaded portico, and an outdoor dining area. Handcrafted tile staircase leads to an ocean-view owners suite, features vaulted ceiling, wraparound windows, raised fireplace, sitting area, wide-plank walnut wood floors, private balcony, and a luxurious bath. On the first floor are two en-suite bedrooms, one with a large sitting room, plus an office that could be a fourth, and guest bathroom with clawfoot tub. Grounds are both lush and manicured, with mature trees, patios for al fresco dining and entertaining, resort-style waterfall pool and Jacuzzi, large motor courtyard with room for guest parking. A compound of rare beauty and quality in a private setting.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/22202-P.description: Located on the prestigious Billionaire's Beach, this stunning Cape Cod-inspired home offers 55 ft of prime beach frontage and breathtaking ocean views. A gated courtyard with an oversized spa tub welcomes you into this private sanctuary. Inside, glass doors and windows frame panoramic ocean vistas, seamlessly connecting the open living space to a spacious beachfront deck complete with custom lounge chairs, a daybed, and a dining area for effortless indoor-outdoor living. The main level features a cozy ocean-view nook, a wood-burning fireplace, a chef's kitchen, an en-suite guest bedroom, a powder room, and an additional full bath. Upstairs, a charming guest bedroom boasts a private balcony, while the Primary Suite offers a fireplace, an ocean-view deck, and a serene coastal ambiance. Just minutes from Nobu, Soho House, and Cross Creek, this exceptional home blends seaside tranquility with world-class amenities. Experience the best of Malibu beachfront living in this exquisite retreat.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/21348-P.description: Palisades Fire burnout lot, 90' on La Costa Beach. Sold before processing, entering for comp purposes

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/30870-B.description: This custom beachfront retreat boasts 38 feet of frontage along the Malibu coastline. Enjoy three bedrooms, four bathrooms, a 3,293-square-foot floorplan and iconic indoor-outdoor living. The home facade presents beautiful brickwork, a tribute to tradition while maintaining the casual elegance that Malibu is known for. Inside, take in endless ocean views and savor details such as hand-carved woodwork, light-filled atriums and an open living/dining area. French doors lead out onto the outdoor patio with a covered seating area. Upstairs, the primary suite offers peaceful white-water views, a vaulted ceiling, fireplace, an oceanfront balcony, a private deck and dual bathrooms. The guest bedroom captures panoramic views and features Porthault hand-painted fabric. Outside, find a grassy, walled courtyard garden and a saltwater pool. A detached guest studio includes a tiled shower, fireplace and kitchenette. Overhead, a rooftop deck provides breathtaking views out to sea and down the coast.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/31026-B.description: Immaculate Cape Cod. Gourmet kitchen (ten burner Wolf Range), wine cellar, tile and brick accents, large brick beachside patio. Separate office and dining area. Comfortable living room with fireplace. Master suite with large shower, spa, his and hers bathrooms, sitting area, fireplace, and large private deck. Incredible detached guest house with its own kitchen, washer and dryer, fireplace, and private deck.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/31516-V.description: This iconic Property was once owned by the King of Cool himself, Steve McQueen. Today it is a sensational Modern beach house. Completely renovated and set behind gates at the far west end of prestigious Broad Beach. A very special home that offers total privacy and seclusion, panoramic white water and coastline views, and direct access to the sandy beaches and coves of Victoria Point. Designed in the minimalistic style of renowned architect John Pawson - the home has a serene, open, clean and uncluttered feel. There are floor to ceiling walls of glass that let in abundant natural light and slide open to expansive ocean front decks. The indoor - outdoor flow is seamless bringing in the sights and sounds of the sea as dolphins, whales and surfers play out front. The open floor plan adds volume and depth as the interior flows freely from gourmet kitchen to ocean view dining and entertainment spaces on down to a comfortable living room with fireplace and attached water front deck. The principal suite is sumptuous with its own fireplace, luxurious spa bath, over-sized walk-in closet and private balcony. https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/33604-P.description: An architectural treasure and an icon of Malibu design with 122 feet of beachfront, Sandcastle was the hand-built home of visionary architect (and surfer) Harry Gesner. Offered for sale for the first time, this tranquil Western Malibu oceanfront property is, according to Gesner, "a dream place, built with love. " When the young architect set out to build his family home, he had big ideas, little money, and an abiding passion for the natural beauty of the secluded cove with a nearby surf break and an empty plot right next door to his most famous building, Wave House. With a roofline inspired by a sandcastle, Gesner was determined to build a home that would fulfill what turned out to be a lifelong philosophy: "You have to have a view. You want perspective to your life. " The home's texture was determined in part by the materials he salvaged as an early evangelist of sustainable construction: telephone poles, reclaimed bricks, wall panels made from aqueduct pipes, birdseye maple from a high school gym, old-growth redwood harvested in the 1800s, and windows and doors saved from one of Hollywood's silent film theaters. As Gesner said about Sandcastle in Houses of the Sundown Sea: The Architectural Vision of Harry Gesner, the book about his life and work, "The spirit in the design and materials are what you immediately feel in this house. All people who enter and spend a brief period or long time here immediately feel at home and relaxed. The experience never becomes commonplace or boring because over everything is the sound and rhythm of the waves breaking on the shore in front of the house. " At the home's entry is a lovely library/sitting area with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves and ocean views. With massive spoke-like beams and a wood-plank ceiling, the heart of the main house is a window-wrapped space that comprises generously scaled living and dining areas with an enormous brick fireplace at its hub. Inspired by the Hollywood Bowl, Gesner built the fireplace as a stage for his wife, actress Nan Martin, with a huge polished concrete hearth. A lovely solarium with stained glass panels flanks the dining area, and the ocean views enjoyed from the interior areas extend to the wraparound deck just outside. Echoing the cylindrical shape of the house itself, the kitchen wraps around a circular island and has tile countertops, stained glass lunettes fitted into the beams overhead, a fireplace, updated appliances, a breakfast bar, and a walk-in pantry. On the home's main level are two en-suite bedrooms, one with built-ins suitable for an office. Upstairs is the primary suite tower, with high ceilings, huge beams, charming eyebrow windows, a brick fireplace, an ocean-view sitting area, and a spiral staircase with handmade driftwood treads leading up to a studio/loft/meditation space. The property's additional structures include an ocean-view "tree house" apartment with a kitchenette, living room/dining area, bedroom, bath, and wraparound deck; a "boat house" with a full kitchen, ocean-view living/dining room with a built-in table and porthole windows, a full bath, and a bedroom; and another one-bedroom apartment "nest" with ocean view and stained glass above an indoor/outdoor cabana. There is also an open-air living area, deck, and teepee-covered daybed. The approximately 0.73-acre property has a three-car garage and additional parking platform, a covered deck, a brick patio, lawn, an outdoor shower, surfboard and other storage areas, steps to the beach, and multiple vantage points for breathtaking sunset views. Sandcastle, which will be sold as is, has abundant outdoor space. A legacy estate with privacy, incomparable character, and singular style.

There is a shelf-lined library/office, state-of-the-art theater room, &  a guest wing with a professional gym, infrared sauna, &  steam room. A staff apartment is above one of two double-car garages. This glamorous, destination-style gated estate also features whole-home water filtration, guest parking for up to 23 cars, &  new A/C. Offered furnished or unfurnished.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/27368-E.description: Crafted with exceptional attention to detail, this coastal residence is a masterclass in quality construction and timeless design. Expansive living spaces exude warmth and elegance, featuring custom finishes such as antique French stone floors reminiscent of sun-washed shores, soaring ceilings, and walls of glass that invite in natural light and ocean breezes. The gourmet kitchen is outfitted with top-of-the-line appliances and seamlessly connects to an oceanfront dining area and generous living room an idyllic setting for effortless beachside entertaining. The primary suite offers a serene private retreat with rich hardwood flooring, dual walls of disappearing glass doors that open to a private balcony, and a luxurious bath with hand-laid mosaic tile, a large shower, separate soaking tub, and an expansive walk-in closet. Four additional bedrooms provide ample accommodations, while a dedicated movie room and a library with built-in desk and reading nook offer versatile spaces for relaxation and creativity. A rooftop deck crowns the home, complete with a heated pool, spa, outdoor kitchen with built-in BBQ, and a fireplace perfect for enjoying the coastal lifestyle in style.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/24254-M.description: Providing spectacular sunsets over the Pacific Ocean and with endless views from Catalina to Channel Islands, this home has one of the widest beachfrontages on Malibu Road at over 83 feet - resort-style living at its finest. The open floor plan provides ocean views that extend from the kitchen, dining area, sitting area and step down living room. Vaulted ceilings and a fireplace add to the ambiance of the living area. The main floor opens to an expansive beach front deck featuring a built-in spa and incredible sea life sightings of seals, dolphins and seasonal whales. There is also a large patio in the front that provides an intimate sitting area for relaxing, barbecuing, and dining as well as a private staircase for easy beach-access. The ocean front primary suite on the main floor offers a beautiful sleeping environment with a fireplace, sitting area and an ensuite bathroom that includes privacy smart glass that goes from translucent to opaque with a flip of a switch. Upstairs provides two additional bedrooms and 2 additional baths. With a private two-car direct access garage and easy parking for 5 additional cars, the proximity of this home is just down the street from the high-end and family-friendly restaurants and retail shopping such as Ollo, Bui Sushi, Lucky's, Cross Creek Malibu Country Mart and Nobu, which all makes this Malibu Road home California living at its best!

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/32232-P.description: Perched on a scenic bluff above El Matador Beach, this stunning parcel of more than 2.2 acres is complete with Building  &  Safety approved house plans for a near-replica of the property's memorable and majestic stone house. With approximately 266 feet of frontage, beach access, and sublime ocean, island, and coastline views, this is one of Malibu's most coveted addresses. Set behind gates at the end of a long drive, the Michael Lee design integrates architectural inspiration and fixtures imported from Buenos Aires, Majorca, and Marseille. Exposed beams, wrought iron detailing, stone-tile floors, wraparound verandahs, and views, views, views create the perfect setting for congenial indoor-outdoor gatherings both intimate and grand. On the main floor is an open, European-feel living/dining great room, a professional chef's kitchen, and two bedrooms, while the entire upper level is home to the romantic and much-expanded primary suite, with fireplace, spa-style bath, and enormous, private, ocean-view verandah. Inspired landscaping and El Matador's picturesque sea stacks complete this distinguished estate property. The plans call for added storage space on the basement level; the design for a new retaining wall has been submitted for City approval. A singular location for a residence and lifestyle of substance and sophistication.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/30227-P.description: This gorgeous, brand-new architectural estate was created by Amit Apel Design for a lifestyle of sophisticated indoor-outdoor living and entertaining. With breathtaking ocean and mountain views from every room and seamless flow from expansive interiors to resort-style decks and patios, this is a residence of exceptional privacy, beauty, and comfort. Located on approximately three-quarters of an acre across from Zuma Beach, with fabulous whitewater views, the gated property combines dramatic geometric forms with serene landscaping to create an ambiance of luxury and tranquility. In addition to dual primary suites, a guest wing, and enormous pocket doors, the home's remarkable details include elegant Italian cabinetry, oak flooring, custom Italian vanities, French plaster bathrooms and fireplaces, enormous indoor and outdoor kitchens with well-appointed appliances, and a whole-house smart control system. The main living area is an open pavilion comprising living, dining, and kitchen with exquisite ocean views and gracious flow to adjacent patios. The living room has a contemporary fireplace and a host's bar with beverage cooler and wine storage. The kitchen is sleek and sensational, with professional appliances, a large island with bar seating, and a built-in breakfast/lunch dining nook with wraparound windows and an atrium skylight. From this central living area, vanishing glass doors open onto a huge entertainer's deck, complete with a full outdoor kitchen, a partially covered dining area, an outdoor living room with a firepit, a beautiful Pebble Tec pool and Jacuzzi, plus several additional lounging and seating areas and another firepit. Also on the home's main floor are two en-suite bedrooms, one currently serving as a gym, plus an elegant powder room. On the upper level, there is a play area and family room, a laundry, and four ocean-view bedroom suites. Two of these are enormous owners' suites, with fireplace, seating area, walk-in closet, gorgeous spa-style bathrooms, and private decks. One features an atrium with a retractable star-gazer's skylight and the other is currently set up as a private office. Complete with three-zone air conditioning, a three-car garage with electric charger, and parking for a dozen guest vehicles, this new estate represents the pinnacle of contemporary Malibu living.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/3511-Cr.description: Located in Malibu's exclusive, guard-gated Serra Retreat, this contemporary estate reimagined by Malibu Market  &  Design blends refined luxury with relaxed coastal living on 1.24 private acres. Tucked in a quiet cul-de-sac along serene Malibu Creek, this 4-bedroom, 6-bathroom home with a formal living room and spacious family room spans approximately 5,500 SF. Interior highlights include wide plank oak floors, gorgeous, beamed ceilings, and expansive living spaces. The chef's kitchen features Gaggenau appliances, quartz countertops, and custom cabinetry. Disappearing glass doors seamlessly connect indoor and outdoor living, opening to a backyard oasis with an infinity-edge saltwater pool and Baja shelf, al fresco dining area, built-in BBQ, and multiple lounge spaces, all set against a lush lawn with peaceful creek views. The primary suite offers a walk-in closet and spa-style bath with soaking tub and dual vanities. Additional features include a Lutron lighting and audio system, whole-house water softener, backup generator, 2-car garage, and ample guest parking - just minutes from Malibu Country Mart and Surfrider Beach.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/7341-Bi.description: Walk through the front door of this iconic home situated in the most desirable area of Malibu, Point Dume, and you will be awestruck by the unobstructed, sweeping views of the Channel Islands, Zuma Beach, and the coastal mountains. On the market for the first time in 44 years by the original owners, the 5000 sq ft layout was designed to optimize the views and abundant natural light. High vaulted ceilings with blonde wood add to the bright and inviting feel of the open concept gathering areas. Leave your glass sliders open and curl up by the living room fireplace as the sound of crashing waves serenades you while you take in breathtaking sunsets. Unwind in the comfort of the adjacent family room with skylights overhead and a convenient wet bar. Coastline views will inspire the avid chef in the gourmet kitchen. Your private accommodations include 3 bedrooms and 4.25 baths, each with distinctive features, including extensive built-ins. Wake up invigorated as morning rays spill into the large primary suite that's connected to a reading lounge with a vintage fireplace. Primary-bath consists of Spa-like design, inviting fireplace and large soaking tub. Make yourself at home in the private office that brings meetings at home to the next level with phenomenal ocean and coastline landscape with views of Point Dume to inspire you. The gym-ready area is equipped with a steam room and sauna. Stargazers will enjoy the rare bonus of the private observatory far from city lights. Take advantage of the walking trails and easy beach access of the Point Dume Natural Preserve just steps away from your private driveway. Plenty of great dining and shopping options are also nearby, including The Sunset Restaurant, a local favorite. Stylish, comfortable, and filled with light and views, this must-see one-of-a-kind home is where you'll find the Malibu lifestyle you've been dreaming of.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/28779-S.description: Completely reimagined post-and-beam home set on the only gated street in the exclusive Point Dume neighborhood of Malibu. Originally designed by renowned architect Ronald Goldman, FAIA in 1979, the home went through a meticulous 3-year "down-to the-studs" renovation by Alexander Design in collaboration with Alexander Built Properties. The 5-bedroom, 4-bathroom residence seamlessly blends the light filled warmth of post-and-beam architecture with modern luxury. The redesign honors Goldman's commitment to sustainability with drought-tolerant landscaping, cross-ventilation, and skylit hallways that flood the home with natural light. Inside, the home features custom cabinetry, millwork, and brass detailing by Alexander Design, alongside elegant custom stonework, door hardware, Fleetwood doors and windows, Gaggenau appliances, and Cocoon Piet Boom plumbing fixtures. Thoughtfully curated interiors include a blend of custom and collectible vintage furnishings that exude timeless sophistication. The latest and greatest amenities include a new saltwater pool, a pizza oven, a Sonos sound system, and heated bathroom floors. Nestled on a private cul-de-sac, the property also provides an access key to the exclusive Little Dume beach and a shared tennis court. This one-of-a-kind estate captures the essence of Malibu's effortless elegance, offering an unrivaled lifestyle of luxury and coastal serenity.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/27403-P.description: Set in a coveted Malibu enclave consisting of four homes on a private, double-gated street above Escondido Beach and Paradise Cove. This legendary estate, once the primary residence of Rock  &  Roll Hall of Famer Tom Petty, spans 2.6 acres of lush, park-like grounds and offers an exceptionally rare blend of privacy and artistry. Skylights stream light into each thoughtfully designed space, illuminating the home's rich character. Wood-beamed ceilings, vintage chandeliers, exquisite wrought iron detailing, and five stunning fireplaces throughout, including one in the formal dining room with seating for 16 - ideal for unforgettable gatherings. Take sanctuary in the primary retreat featuring sitting area with romantic fireplace, exclusive patio with fountain, and luxurious bath highlighted by soaking tub and steam shower with Moroccan tiles. The enormous walk-in closet with island is worthy of rock royalty. Bonus room with skylights, fountain and dry sauna offers flexible space for gym/yoga/massage room. All bedrooms offer direct access to the outdoor gardens and trellised patios complete with built-in BBQ, in-ground fire pit, manicured lawns, and a glistening pool with spa making it an entertainer's dream. The estate is surrounded by meticulously curated grounds where bougainvillea, white roses, jasmine, and wildflowers flourish. Tom's personal music studio, transformed from a 2-bedroom guest house and garage, remains fully pre-wired-ready for someone else's "runnin' down a dream. " An additional 1-bedroom studio is nestled next to a tranquil side yard with pond. Motor court with parking for 15+ cars, solar panels for sustainable living, staff quarters, generator and a night-lit sports court ready for basketball /pickleball found just steps from the driveway. Surrounded by cascading waterfalls, koi ponds, fruit trees, and fountains, this estate has been referred to as a "Mini Huntington Gardens. " For nearly 30 years, it served as a refuge of inspiration, peace, and creativity for one of music's greatest legends. This is more than a home it's a piece of rock history. A haven where the next chapter is ready to be written!

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/25110-M.description: Rare opportunity to own 70 feet of beach frontage on the deepest and best section of sandy beach on Malibu Rd. It does not get better than this family heirloom. Classic Spanish style home remodeled in the 80s with character and charm. A large entry courtyard makes for a private entertaining space. The main floor opens to expansive deck space and easy beach access. Master occupies the entire 2nd floor with a fireplace, a private balcony, and generous closets. Tenant occupied.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/23649-M.description: Seclusion, peace, and tranquility define this Malibu Colony retreat. Located within the most sought after, exclusive guard-gated community in Malibu, this spacious contemporary home with coveted private beach key access allows for easy coastal living. On the main level, soaring high ceilings and French doors welcome in plenty of natural light throughout the open living and dining areas. From here, glass pocket doors open to an expansive backyard complete with an outdoor kitchen, pool and spa, sauna, and ice bath. Upstairs, the second level mezzanine wraps around to two additional bedrooms as well as the primary wing. The primary suite includes everything from a private deck and fireplace to an en-suite bathroom outfitted with a custom oversized shower, tub, and sauna. On the third level, an impressive ocean view roof deck, an idyllic setting for outdoor entertaining right on the coast.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/27050-M.description: Experience breathtaking beachfront living in this coveted Cove Colony oasis, offering 4 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and 3,816 SF of sophisticated living space. During a 2005-2010 renovation, the home was thoughtfully revamped, using the best, high-quality materials. Guard-gated and secure, the home presents extraordinary views ranging from Palos Verdes to Point Dume. Past the new driveway, front landscaping, and courtyard sitting area, enter a serene atmosphere with glistening white oak floors, soaring ceilings, and a spectacular centerpiece: the Pacific Ocean. Through glass doors is a heavenly ipe view deck. The modern, open kitchen features Thermador appliances and custom cabinetry. A dining area looks out to the magnificent views. An additional wood deck is situated on the second level, along with two ocean front bedrooms, each with its own beautiful design elements. Enjoy an office, laundry room, bar, fireplace, 2-car garage, and abundant comforts. For those seeking immaculate natural beauty, you've arrived.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/5901-Fi.description: Restored, reenvisioned, and celebrated as one of Edward Fickett's most remarkable architectural creations, The Filaree House is thoughtfully situated on over an acre in Malibu Park. While honoring Fickett's midcentury modern vision, the renovation upholds the authenticity of the original details and design. The gated driveway leads to the expansive approach and vestibule, where walls of glass unveil the grandeur of the double-level living room below, offering breathtaking vistas of the blue hues of the Pacific and vibrant sunsets. The main level contains the open-concept chef's kitchen and dining area overlooking the grassy lawn, shimmering pool, and paddle tennis court. A corridor of original beams leads to the primary suite with a sanctuary-style ensuite and an enchanting private meditation garden, fostering a sense of tranquility and serenity. Accompanying this level are two additional bedrooms, each complete with its ensuite bath. The staircase leads down to the living room, featuring a wood-burning fireplace, and an adjoining family room extending seamlessly to the vast grounds, creating an inviting space for relaxation and gatherings. This level also includes a stylish study and an additional primary suite. Completing the estate is a secondary A-frame structure that offers versatile space for an office or gym, while a renovated Airstream nestles below on one of the terraces. An iconic Malibu midcentury modern masterpiece, The Filaree House blends the timeless design of yesteryear with modern luxury.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/6709-Zu.description: Privately set behind a gated driveway in the prestigious Point Dume enclave, this remarkable estate embodies refined sophistication, seamless indoor-outdoor living, unparalleled craftsmanship, and Riviera 1 beach key access. A generous gravel motor court offers ample parking, leading to a striking covered entry and custom wood pivot door. Inside, soaring ceilings, recessed lighting, and skylights bathe the open-concept living space in natural light. Smooth cement floors extend throughout, while a wall of pivoting glass doors dissolves the boundary between indoors and the lush backyard. Custom built-ins and a concealed closet add both style and function. Nearby, the powder room is a bold statement with designer wallpaper and polished cement flooring. At the heart of the home, the chef's kitchen is exquisitely appointed with stone countertops, bespoke cabinetry, and premium Miele appliances, including a five-burner range, oven, dishwasher, and integrated fruit and freezer drawers. A hidden nook conceals a coffee station, microwave, and additional prep space. A Fisher  &  Paykel refrigerator drawer, water filtration system, and an intimate dining area complete the space. State-of-the-art smart home systems including Sonos audio, intercom, security cameras, and lighting are all centrally controlled. A sliding door off the kitchen opens to a well-appointed mudroom with built-ins and side yard access. Downstairs, the lower level offers a spacious laundry area with an LG washer and dryer, deep sink, storage, and dual tankless water heaters. A nearby bathroom showcases wood flooring, a stone vanity, and a skylit shower with deep green tile and dual showerheads. The home's flexible layout includes an office or guest bedroom overlooking the pool, as well as two additional bedrooms each with white oak floors, built-in closets, and en-suite baths featuring stone vanities and tiled showers. The primary suite is a private sanctuary with sliding glass doors to the backyard, built-in shelving, and a custom-designed walk-in closet. Its spa-like en-suite bath features a freestanding soaking tub, double vanity, water closet, and a luxurious steam shower. The backyard is a serene retreat designed for both relaxation and entertaining. Smooth concrete surfaces and a covered lounge with built-in heaters create an inviting atmosphere, while a wood deck surrounds the true lap pool. A sunken firepit with built-in seating, an outdoor kitchen with a Wolfe grill, mini fridge, and dedicated dining space elevate the experience. Adjacent to the pool, a built-in Jacuzzi and cold plunge offer a spa-like escape, while an outdoor shower is discreetly positioned near the primary suite. A separate structure functions as a gym, office, or guest suite, featuring pocketing glass doors, full mirrors, a covered deck with built-in heaters, and an en-suite bath with a skylit tiled shower and stone vanity. Lush landscaping, mature citrus trees, and a comprehensive security system enhance the property's privacy and tranquility. At the far end of the estate, a meticulously restored train caboose offers an unparalleled guest retreat. Accordion doors reveal a charming living and sleeping area with a built-in dining nook, TV, and a well-equipped kitchen featuring a Wolfe electric range, microwave, and refrigerator drawers. A sliding wood door leads to a stylish bath with a rainfall shower and stone vanity, while the rooftop deck provides a scenic perch for relaxation and entertaining. Crafted with the finest materials including Douglas Fir wood, aluminum-framed dual-glazed windows, Terrazzo marble countertops, and artisan clay-tiled baths this home is a true masterpiece. White oak floors extend throughout the bedrooms, while additional features such as an automatic pool cover, 220v outlet, and commercial-grade systems underscore the estate's exceptional quality and modern conveniences.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/31324-B.description: Sparking, light and bright Broad Beach home with cool, clean lines and beach chic sensibility. Spacious living and bedroom areas are bathed in sunlight, and offer tremendous indoor/outdoor entertainment flow with walls of glass to maximize the California beach lifestyle. Large ocean front master bedroom suite will inspire you with vaulted distressed wood ceilings, fireplace, dual bath and closet areas. Two additional bedrooms are featured in the main residence including a lovely first floor suite that opens to a sunny courtyard. The detached guest house with kitchenette and full bath area offers flexibility for friends or use as a media/studio room. Parking is a dream with a 3 car garage with 3 more off street spaces. This beachfront retreat with an inviting open floor plan has been recently refreshed and updated. This is the Malibu beachfront property you have been waiting for. Motivated Seller.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/22407-C.description: California dreaming. Stunning contemporary home with walls of glass that look out to staggering panoramic ocean views from Santa Monica to Point Dume and beyond. Chic open floor plan with sophisticated finishes. Gracious primary suite with two very large walk-in closets and balcony jutting out to the ocean views. Gated, and sited on over 2 acres of manicured grounds with 5 hole par 3 golf course, organic vegetable gardens and vineyards. Pool surrounded by romantic lounge area with fire pit and large grassy yard. Beach and tennis rights at Malibu La Costa Beach Club. Quintessential Malibu living at its finest.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/23038-P.description: Legendary location, trophy home in Malibu on Surfrider Beach for sale! This amazing once-in-a-lifetime opportunity is available to own the last property adjacent to the iconic Malibu Pier with unobstructed views of the world-famous Surfrider Beach. Seamless walls of glass opening to sun-drenched decks and 180 degree views of Malibu Pier, the Queen's Necklace, and Catalina Island, and the sunset towards the historic Adamson House, Surfrider Beach, and hills of Malibu. Watch or join the surfers each day in one of California's most incredible surfing locations with easy access to local restaurants, Nobu, Soho House, The Malibu Inn, and Cross Creek Plaza. This home was completely remodeled down to the studs and renovated with the highest quality, taste, and design to include an open, gourmet kitchen with Wolf double oven range with griddle, Subzero refrigerator, Wolf convection microwave, Asko dishwasher, Carrera Marble countertops, filtered tap water, Subzero 150 wine bottle refrigerator, Legrande lighting throughout, Sonos sound system, Fleetwood accordion doors, Hunter Douglas electric shades, custom colored hardwood floors, tankless water heater, hot/cold outdoor shower, central A/C and heating, automatic security gate and a two-car garage. This home is one of a kind and no place is more special than this unique, trophy location in Malibu, CA.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/6172-Bo.description: Nestled in Malibu's coveted Bonsall Canyon, renowned for its tree-lined streets and proximity to Point Dume and Zuma Beach, this single-story ranch estate offers a harmonious blend of refined design and relaxed coastal living. Set on 1.6 gated acres, the 5,261-square-foot property includes a 3-bedroom, 3.5-bath main residence and a 1-bed, 1-bath guest house with a full kitchen, both adorned with hardwood floors and bespoke detailing. At the heart of the home, a chef's kitchen outfitted with Viking appliances opens to sun-drenched living spaces that flow effortlessly into the manicured grounds. French doors reveal a private backyard sanctuary featuring a 50-foot freshwater pool with diving board, dual outdoor showers, a fire pit, and an illuminated putting green, ideal for entertaining or peaceful relaxation. The primary suite offers tranquil garden views, dual closets, radiant heated floors, and a spa-inspired bath with steam shower. Equipped with solar panels, four Tesla Powerwalls, and a grandfathered well with smart irrigation, Bonsall seamlessly marries sustainability with modern luxury. Here, elegance, privacy, and coastal beauty unite to define the true essence of Malibu living.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/6530-Zu.description: The Malibu Surf Barn: A rare, all-encompassing Point Dume retreat where a mostly flat acre of private land meets deeded access to two of Malibu's most exclusive sandy coves. With dual gated private entries to Little Dume beach via Riviera 1 and Paradise Cove's "The Hut, " this 2020-built estate offers unmatched privacy, scale, and a beachside experience rarely ever available at this price point. At the heart of the home, a soaring great room with 18-foot tongue and groove vaulted ceilings, a 5-foot Isokern fireplace, and oversized Fleetwood glass pocket doors opens seamlessly to the outdoors. Entertain effortlessly from the chef's kitchen, featuring top-tier appliances, a grand island, and an impressive wine fridge. Outside, the grounds have been meticulously landscaped and curated for everyday enjoyment and entertaining - complete with a pool and spa, picturesque oak grove, fully outfitted and heated covered patio with fireplace, built-in Heston BBQ, audio system, outdoor shower, surf shed, and a 4x4 vehicle for easy access down your private trail to the beach. One wing of the home boasts a spacious primary suite with garden views, a resort-style spa bathroom, and a custom walk-in closet with Caruso jewelry safe. Two additional en-suite guest bedrooms open to private patios, while the opposite wing features a media/game room and a versatile fourth en-suite bedroom or office. Private walkway access to Little Dume, combined with deeded access via a gated, paved road, is a rare privilege reserved for only a handful of Malibu's most premier properties. This is a one of a kind opportunity to own an immersive Malibu beach retreat at this level of value and exclusivity.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/21414-P.description: An idyllic mid-century retreat on the best section of La Costa Beach. Never before listed for sale, this was the Malibu beach home of legendary composer Henry Mancini. The property is perfectly situated on a deep, sandy section of beach far from public access and features breathtaking ocean views from Point Dume and the Malibu Pier all the way to the sparkling Queen's Necklace. Enter through a spacious courtyard with a seating area and gas fire pit surrounded by lush, mature landscaping. Inside, the ocean views are seemingly endless and the home is flooded with beautiful natural light and gentle sea breeze. The living room fronts the beach and boasts a marble fireplace, built-in TV, and sliding doors leading out onto the oceanfront deck and private beach access. The dining area features a built-in seating area overlooking the sand and surf and leads into the kitchen with stainless steel appliances, Viking dual ovens, and a breakfast bar. Upstairs, the primary bedroom enjoys beautiful views, vaulted wood-beamed ceilings, access to an outdoor deck, and an en-suite bathroom with a marble shower/soaking tub and bidet. There is a second oceanfront bedroom with deck access and an additional bedroom and full bathroom on the second floor. On the entry level, there is a fourth bedroom currently set up as an office. Other features include a 2-car garage and driveway that could fit an additional 2 cars. This special property served as home and inspiration to the musician who created countless hits and movie scores, including Academy Award-winning "Moon River" from Breakfast at Tiffany's and the iconic Pink Panther theme. This is a rare opportunity to own a beautiful piece of history!

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/1401-Co.description: From the grand entry plaza to the picture-perfect ocean views, this magnificent Spanish villa is elegant in every detail. Sited for maximum privacy, the 36-plus acre estate is both personal sanctuary and flawless setting for extravagant entertaining. It is surrounded by four additional parcels of pristine landscape for a total of 225 acres. Generous amenities, such as a guest house, gorgeous infinity pool, and a lawn large enough to accommodate hundreds of party guests, are complemented by exquisitely crafted details: exposed beams, traditional decorative tilework, and floors of Saltillo tiles and hardwood. The living room is palatial, with its soaring ceiling, clerestory lights, large fireplace, arched doorways, and enormous arched window facing the sea. The chandelier dining room, also with a fireplace, overlooks the pool and ocean views. The chef's kitchen, with skylight, ocean view, and superb tilework, has a large island, granite countertops, wine storage, a walk-in pantry, and a lovely breakfast area. The home's bedrooms are arranged in two separate wings for maximum privacy, space, and views. One wing has two bedrooms on the main level that open onto a private patio and palapa, plus a staff/guest suite on the lower level, complete with two bedrooms, office, and living room/kitchenette. The owner's wing is a stunning ocean-view retreat with a fireplace, clerestory accent windows, arched doorways, a large cedar-lined walk-in closet, and glass doors that open onto an open-air patio refuge. A gorgeous bath with sparkling emerald tilework opens to a large lounging terrace where a portico shades an ocean-view spa. This majestic suite also features a private sitting room with a fireplace and quiet loft space that could be an office, yoga room, library, or art studio. The enormous backyard, which commands spectacular ocean, island, and Queen's Necklace views, features a sublime infinity pool, Jacuzzi, full outdoor kitchen, bar seating, and numerous patio areas for day and evening entertaining. The guest house, scenically sited on a lower part of the estate, is entirely separate from the main residence. Adjacent to the expansive lawn, it has a wraparound porch and patio with an outdoor kitchen and a pergola for al fresco dining. Created with the same exacting attention to detail as the main house, the guest accommodations include a double-height living room and full kitchen, fireplace, dining and lounging gallery, bedroom, bathroom, powder room, and additional loft bedroom. There is also a laundry room plus a lovely pergola-shaded patio with a hot tub. Among the property's many additional features are a separate gated service entrance with a large motor court and event-staging area, a large solar array, and a three-car garage plus ample parking for 20 or more vehicles. One of the adjoining parcels features an approximately 800 square foot cinderblock structure, fully permitted by Charter Communications and complete with generator and air conditioning. Sublimely private and yet located just minutes from trails, beaches, and all the amenities of Malibu, this is a legacy property designed for a lifestyle of luxury and comfort. The following APNs are included, 4461-004-027 (15.74 acres), 4461-004-028 (24.28 acres), 4461-004-030 (36.29 acres), 4461-004-049 (72.74 acres) and 4461-005-057 (76.61 acres).

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/6907-Gr.description: Huge PRICE REDUCTION for this Architecturally Designed Home with BEACH KEY on Point Dume. Enjoy breathtaking Ocean Views of the Santa Monica Bay by day and the Queen's necklace at night. Completely redesigned in 2012, this gated Estate offers a new Salt Water Pool and outdoor entertainment area with sand fire-pit, an organic fruit orchard, drought tolerant landscaping, a full guest house overlooking the pool plus lots of flat and usable land for gardening  &  other outdoor pastimes. Interior features include a huge Bulthaup Kitchen with walnut cabinetry and stainless steel appliances. Enjoy the spacious ocean view Master Suite with fireplace and master bathroom with steam shower and soaking tub looking out to the Santa Monica Bay. This property has a BEACH KEY to "Little Dume", one of Malibu's best surfing beaches.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/23644-M.description: Contiguous to the exclusive guard-gated Malibu Colony and situated off Malibu Road, these properties are surrounded by exceptional natural beauty, a close-knit community as well as exceptional dining and entertainment. The Malibu Colony Parcel offers a rare chance to live in one of the world's most desirable seaside cities. This once-in-a-lifetime opportunity has the potential for ten homesites totaling approximately 3.58 acres. Tucked behind the guard gates of Malibu Colony, the proposed homes will range in size from 2,957 to 3,366 square feet, each is equipped with preliminary plans by renowned architect Doug Burdge AIA.

Contiguous to the exclusive guard-gated Malibu Colony and situated off Malibu Road, these properties are surrounded by exceptional natural beauty, a close-knit community as well as exceptional dining and entertainment. The Malibu Colony Parcel offers a rare chance to live in one of the world's most desirable seaside cities. This once-in-a-lifetime opportunity has the potential for ten homesites totaling approximately 3.58 acres. Tucked behind the guard gates of Malibu Colony, the proposed homes will range in size from 2,957 to 3,366 square feet, each is equipped with preliminary plans by renowned architect Doug Burdge AIA.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/7319-Bi.description: A magnificent ocean-view great room flanked on two sides by walls of glass suggests a lifestyle of ease and sophistication in this distinguished Point Dume estate. The bespoke architectural vision of Marmol Radziner highlights the expansive space with mid-century restraint and exquisite finishes. The home is built on a single level to take advantage of remarkable sightlines and generous settings for indoor-outdoor living and entertaining. The front of the property is defined by a gated drive and then by a separate pedestrian gate. This leads to a large, private, beautifully landscaped and lighted patio, complete with an outdoor kitchen, fireplace, and comfortable seating. The patio enjoys enchanting views of the ocean that reach through the dual glass walls of the great room. This grand interior space, with high, beamed ceilings and wide-plank wood floors, is breathtaking in scale and modernist grace. At one end, a long, well-outfitted wet bar and island with bar seating offer an ideal hub for circulating guests at a cocktail party. Next to the bar is an open dining area, and beyond that, a large and flexible living area. At the end of the room, a beautiful modern brick fireplace is offset by display shelving with a library ladder, plus a concealed television cabinet. The kitchen extends from the bar end of the great room, where it enjoys views of both the ocean and the front yard. Beautiful finishes, expansive cabinets, and top-quality appliances are designed to please the most demanding chef. Four wide glass doors from the ocean-facing great room open onto the partially covered back patio, where there is a small Zen garden, a firepit, comfortable seating, ample room for dining, and spectacular views of the ocean and the Channel Islands. The home's four bedrooms, one currently used as an en-suite media room, include a peaceful primary retreat complete with fireplace, built-in nightstands, walk-in closet, sliding glass doors to the backyard, and a stone-clad spa-style bath that opens onto a charming private patio with an outdoor shower. Additional features of this impressive residence include a two-car garage with a commercial refrigerator plus driveway parking for four cars; a laundry room with sleek built-ins; heated floors; air conditioning; drip irrigation; and a variety of smart-home systems. With exceptional privacy and expansive views, this Point Dume home is a rare achievement.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/24320-M.description: A rare oceanfront opportunity on Malibu Road with approx. 75' of beach frontage, pool and spa and a separate guest house! Enter this charming 4 bedroom, 4 bathroom property through a private gated entry into a walled courtyard surrounded by overhanging trees with pool and ocean view spa, built-in BBQ, wonderful entertaining areas and stairs to beach. Enjoy stunning ocean views from the spacious living/dining areas with high ceilings, floor-to-ceiling windows, a fireplace, kitchen and wrap around ocean view deck perfect for entertaining and oceanfront dining. The master suite is oceanside and opens to the deck. The other two bedrooms offer ensuite bathrooms, one has double doors leading to the pool, the other has a fireplace and access to an ocean view deck. There is a fabulous separate guest house above the garage with one bedroom, one bath, kitchen, ocean view deck and private entrance. Includes plans and permits in process for remodel.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/7015-Gr.description: Reminiscent of a seaside Italian villa, this spacious Point Dume garden compound is light-filled, welcoming, and perfectly designed for a lifestyle of luxurious relaxation and generous entertaining. Sitting behind gates on over 1.2 acres, the residence has huge windows and multiple decks and patios for enjoying the views of the Santa Monica Mountains, the ocean, and the sparkling Queen's Necklace. The gracious interior has high, beamed ceilings, arched doorways, glossy hardwood floors, and an open layout conducive to congenial gatherings. The living room and formal dining room both open onto a wraparound deck where there is a fire pit, an outdoor dining area, and ample room for lounging. The kitchen is superbly equipped for major entertaining and has a large island topped with butcher-block walnut, a built-in beverage cooler, Taj Mahal quartzite countertops, a casual dining area, plus a built-in breakfast nook. A hallway lined with windows leads to a family/sitting area with a fireplace and doors opening to the front yard. There are four beautiful bedrooms and four bathrooms on this level as well as a powder room and laundry room. Ascend to the upper level by home's main staircase, near the entry, or via a spiral staircase. Upstairs, the elegant primary suite, with beamed chandelier ceiling, large walk-in closet, and beautiful bath, opens onto a luxurious ocean-view deck with comfortable seating. Also on this level is a powder room and an enormous bonus room with a fireplace. Sliding glass doors open to a spacious deck, with ample room for dining and entertaining, and across the deck is a yoga/fitness studio with a ballet barre and fireplace. The home has a charming side patio with a fire pit and fountain, plus an enormous ocean-view backyard, with a pool, spacious pool deck for lounging and dining, a jacuzzi set beneath a bougainvillea-clad gazebo, an outdoor kitchen/barbecue area, and a large lawn for recreation and entertaining. There is also a structure that has a full bath and kitchenette and could be a guest suite, office, cabana, or studio. The grounds are verdant and stunning, with an enormous garden that has a bridge and an outdoor living room. There is a three-car garage plus room for eight or more cars in the driveway. Exceptionally private, this enchanting estate is a very special refuge. Close to the newly redone steps on Big Dume that lead to coveted Little Dume and all the rewards of Malibu Living.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/5825-Mu.description: Dramatic contemporary home situated on approx. 3.36 acres offering unobstructed 360 degree views of the Pacific ocean, Pt. Dume, mountains, and Escondido Falls. Large open spaces with interiors and furnishings designed by Nate Berkus with soaring ceilings and walls of glass that open to the oversized outdoor entertaining area complete with sprawling green lawns, sparkling pool and spa and dramatic sunset views. Gourmet kitchen with huge island, perfect for family and friends to gather around. This spectacular property offers a convenience to enjoy the outdoor Malibu lifestyle with some of Southern California's most coveted hiking trails steps from your front door. Wander through your private vineyard, home to Sanity wine, one of Malibu's premier local wines and experience the serenity that is Malibu.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/25225-M.description: A divine modern retreat set above prime Malibu coastline, 25225 Malibu Road offers far-reaching ocean views plus seamless access to local conveniences. Designed by renowned architect Doug Burdge, this newly completed estate is replete with open-plan living spaces and entertainment-ready outdoor space. Inside the 3,254-SF, 2-level home, find a foyer with approx. 30-foot-tall ceilings, 3 all-ensuite bedrooms and 1 half bath, hardwood floors and walls of pocket, Fleetwood windows that encircle the estate and open to the main level wraparound deck and terrace with fire pit. The upper level encompasses a formal living room, a kitchen with Miele appliances, a glass-lined deck with whitewater ocean views and a primary suite with floor-to-ceiling windows and a spa-like bath. Additional features include a gated entry, an elevator, 4-car garage and driveway parking for up to 10 cars. 25225 Malibu Road is a short walk to Malibu's famed Malibu Road sandy beach, minutes from Little Beach House Malibu, Nobu, the Malibu Pier and Solstice Canyon hiking trails.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/31630-S.description: Nestled along the gated and prestigious Sea Level Drive, this remarkable four-level residence exudes elegance and tranquility. Enter through the inviting, private courtyard bathed in sunlight or via the attached 2-car garage equipped with an elevator. Illuminated by an abundance of natural light and boasting captivating ocean vistas, step into the grand living room adorned with vaulted ceilings, a chic bar area, and a cozy fireplace. Floor-to-ceiling glass walls and sliding doors seamlessly merge indoor and outdoor spaces, inviting you to the oceanfront deck where serene moments and memorable gatherings await. On the second level find a chef's kitchen, featuring high-end stainless Thermidor appliances and a spacious center island offering sweeping ocean views. The third floor features four ensuite bedrooms, along with the primary bedroom facing the pacific with a spa like bath, fireplace, and sprawling ocean-view deck. In addition to the homes beach frontage, the property includes a beach lot immediately adjacent: 4470-001-003 (4,409 sq. ft. ). Also for lease unfurnished for $27,500 per month, one year lease minimum and/or 'long term' only.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/7317-Bi.description: Available for the first time on the market is this original mid-century modern home on the bluffs of Point Dume. Four bedrooms, four bath approximately 3,000 SqFt home with wide open panoramic views of the Pacific Ocean and Channel Island sunsets. Sold "AS IS" bring your designer or contractor to this premier bluff location in highly desirable Point Dume. Additional Lot APN 4468-020-020 included in sale.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/24112-M.description: Great Malibu Road property with outstanding coastline views of the Colony Beach and queen's necklace. This impeccably maintained, designer property has a contemporary organic feel with the use of exotic woods to create an easy going classic modern home. The open kitchen combines zebra wood, leather finished black granite and see-through glass cabinetry with the dining room cantilevered over the Pacific. The dining and living rooms are centered around a circular fireplace and open to an ocean front deck. The primary suite includes an ocean view office, a second fireplace and a quartzite bathroom with white ripped oak cabinetry. The massive roof top deck with fire pit, spa and outdoor kitchen are the cherry on top providing room to entertain with 180 degree views of the Santa Monica Bay from Palos Verdes to the islands. This property does not disappoint even the most discerning client.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/21844-P.description: Best house, large decks, and best price on CARBON BEACH! Enjoy this getaway all year round. Large ocean front deck, with private spa, and steps to the sand. Beautifully furnished 3 bedroom warm and inviting beach home you won't want to leave. New upper deck, and exterior lighting on the ocean side. Front stairs and side stairs to the sand. All refurbished interiors. Call soon for a private showing.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/6261-Ta.description: A rare modern architectural masterpiece with spectacular whitewater ocean views. This compound has it all, including an address in one of the few private neighborhood enclaves with deeded beach rights and pathway traversing under PCH providing access to coveted Escondido Beach. The main estate sits behind private gates with a living koi pond entry exterior hallway, ascending to the 2nd level foyer - offering spectacular sweeping whitewater ocean views upon entry. An open floor plan, ideal for entertaining, boasts floor to ceiling walls of glass opening to large patios, fire pits and seating areas. High ceilings invite in abundant light to flood the chef's kitchen and fully-equipped bar and outdoor kitchen. A pool, spa, N/S tennis court, and guest house with separate entrance complete this rare offering. Price includes the Rolls Royce in the garage.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/27300-P.description: Loaded with appeal, abundant views, and a cabin-like ambiance, this oceanfront compound with 66 feet of beach frontage is a masterpiece in wood, brick, and stone. A separate guest house, private brick patio, full-width ocean-view deck, and frontage on Escondido Beach are highlighted with very tall wood ceilings, lustrous paneling and wood plank floors, and an open flow conducive to congenial indoor-outdoor gatherings. The central living area comprises a living room and kitchen divided by a large fireplace and floor-to-ceiling brick chimneypiece. A wall of glass on one side of the living room opens to the ocean-view deck, with ample room for lounging and al fresco dining, plus steps down to the sand. The well-equipped kitchen has generous counter space and a wide bank of garden windows. Off the kitchen is a separate formal dining room with library shelving and a sliding glass door to the oceanfront deck. The home's two bedrooms include a lovely primary suite with a tiled fireplace, walk-in closet, ocean-view bath, and a private beachfront deck. A stairway in the living room leads to the lower level, where there is a spacious family/media/office/recreation room with a door leading to the beach, where there is additional room for entertaining, relaxing, and star-gazing. At the front of the house, a beautiful rose garden patio offers very private outdoor living and dining space with a barbecue. Off the patio, the guest house, which has a celebrity pedigree, is currently used as a studio. It has chandelier-height truss-and-beam ceilings, a kitchenette, and a bathroom. Equipped with security, air conditioning, and solar power, this is Malibu beach living at its most charming.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/3900-Vi.description: Step into this spectacular Malibu architectural estate, with its impressive walls of glass, and awe inspiring ocean and sunset views from Santa Monica to Point Dume! Come prepared to say WOW! The property is tucked behind gates, in a private enclave of homes, overlooking beautiful Carbon Beach. An unforgettable home on approximately 1 acre which features a two-story guest suite, lap pool, private north/south tennis court and multiple entertaining decks with jetliner white water ocean views. An expansive great room opens to extraordinary panoramic ocean views with an open concept floor plan ideal for entertaining. High ceilings, art walls, a large dining room and cook's kitchen with more ocean views. A separate media suite includes a game room and refrigerated wine cellar that open to the tennis court. The primary suite has incredible ocean-views, a woodburning fireplace, gorgeous bathroom with a steam shower and an impressive extra large custom closet  &  sauna. All additional guest bedrooms are en-suite with beautiful ocean views. Many wonderful indoor and outdoor entertaining spaces, lovely low maintenance landscaping, beautiful date palms, all make this easy living home simply exceptional. Close to Santa Monica and to the wonderful shops and restaurants in Malibu. Just minutes to SOHO Little Beach House and Nobu. La Costa Beach and Tennis Club rights. Location, location, location!! Live the Malibu dream! ALSO AVAILABLE FOR SUMMMER LEASE AT $65,000 PER MONTH.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/27352-P.description: What an awesome beach house! Situated in the Perfect Malibu location - down a quiet, private lane (tucked away from the hustle and bustle of PCH) on sandy Escondido Beach. Close to the center of Malibu, Geoffrey's Restaurant and famed Paradise Cove. A warm, light filled Architectural home with sliding walls of glass, large cantilevered decks and endless ocean, coastline and city light views. A dramatic open concept kitchen - dining - living room space greets you as you enter. This space flows seamlessly out to a sunny ocean front balcony with panoramic views of Paradise Cove, Catalina Island and the entire Santa Monica Bay. Upstairs is a sumptuous principal suite with two spa-like bathrooms, two walk-in closets and cozy fireplace. There are two additional and very comfortable guest suites (plus a large bonus/media room that could be used as a fourth bedroom). The home has high ceilings, wood flooring, high quality appliances/finishes, and state of the art electronics including a Crestron Smart Home System with one touch lighting, Sonos music, electric thermostats, electric shades and security cameras. Plus, huge beach level deck area below the house with Jacuzzi, outdoor shower and ample room for entertaining and storing all of your beach toys like paddle boards, kayaks, etc. which you'll surely be using on this prime stretch of beach. An amazing opportunity!

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/21460-P.description: This amazing La Costa Beach architectural has everything you need for the beachfront Malibu lifestyle: unobstructed ocean views, open layout, soaring ceilings, walls of glass, beachfront decks, loads of built-in cabinets, and a beautiful spiral staircase with floating wood treads and wrought iron railing. The main living area is a great room with open flow between living, dining, kitchen, and a full-width dining and lounging deck overlooking the peaceful sandy beach. The living room has two-story ceilings with windows all the way to the roof, a fireplace, and a charming built-in reading nook with its own view of La Costa Beach. The ocean-view chef's kitchen, with blue granite countertops and detailing, is beautifully designed and equipped to adapt easily to private culinary adventures and lively social gatherings. Doors off the kitchen lead to the two-car garage, with laundry, and a bathroom with a door to the beach stairway. At the top of the stunning spiral staircase there are three bedrooms and a loft-style family/media room, which could serve as an additional bedroom or office. These tranquil spaces have high, plank and beam ceilings and generous amounts of glass, including clerestory windows. The primary suite overlooks the living room and has a private ocean-view balcony for wave watching and star gazing, plus a luxurious spa-style bath and walk-in closet. There is also an outdoor shower at the side of the house. With magnificent views and luminous open design, this is private retreat with all the indulgent comforts of vacation living. 2 car garage + driveway parking off  PCH.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/5068-Ca.description: Welcome to Villa Paradiso. The epitome of coastal luxury living in the prestigious Carbon Beach Terrace Estates, where breathtaking ocean views meet unparalleled elegance. Nestled in the coveted enclave of Malibu's famed Billionaire's Beach, this exclusive estate offers an unrivaled opportunity to create your dream home on a pristine canvas of approximately 29 acres. Boasting unobstructed 360-degree views of the sparkling Pacific Ocean and coastline, this prime parcel is a rare gem awaiting your vision. Majestic gates beckon you into a world of serenity and sophistication, where approved city plans and permits are in place for an exquisite contemporary architectural masterpiece designed by renowned architect Jay Vanos. Spanning approximately 13,355 square feet, this visionary design seamlessly blends indoor and outdoor living, with expansive entertainment spaces and luxurious amenities to satisfy even the most discerning tastes. Imagine indulging in a world-class wine cellar, entertaining guests in the seated bar and game room, or unwinding in the home theater and piano bar. For the wellness enthusiast, a fully-equipped gym and sauna/steam room offer the perfect retreat, while outdoor amenities abound with an infinity pool, jacuzzi, pizza oven, and built-in BBQ. Whether lounging in the sunken seating area or enjoying cocktails at the swim-up bar, every moment is imbued with the essence of luxury living. Includes deeded access to the prestigious La Costa Beach  &  Tennis Club. With convenient proximity to Pacific Coast Highway and Malibu's renowned dining, shopping, and entertainment destinations, this double gated gem is truly an opportunity not to be missed. Available to be sold as a package.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/3539-Cr.description: Tenant occupied until August 15, 2018. Property is being sold with "Active paid for permits for a second story Master Suite and swimming pool". Approved Plans will increase the Sq. Ft to 6,382 sq. ft. Existing Single Story home is well maintained and includes dark hardwood floors, Viking Kitchen, Granite counter tops, Upgraded baths and two garages for a total of 4 indoor parking spaces. Delightfully private location near the end of the Cul de Sac on . 89 of an acre. Neighborhood is close to hiking trails yet close in. Short distance to Farmers Market, restaurants, shopping, Library, Malibu Lagoon and Surfrider Beach. Two story guesthouse is great for guests or office.

https://www.redfin.com/CA/Malibu/42500-P.description: A celebrity estate in an incomparable coastal setting, this majestic property combines classic detailing with spacious contemporary light and beauty. Commanding a sweeping panorama of ocean and islands from expansive windows and beachfront decks, this is a home created for sophisticated living and impressive entertaining. Uniquely situated on the shore of Livingston Beach (next to County Line Beach), this gated residence enjoys approximately 55 feet of beach frontage. The home's main floor is luminous and grand, from the three-story, glass-ceiling foyer to the stunning, 50-foot oceanfront living room, with its beautiful stone floors, fireplace, spectacular views, and beachside deck just outside. Sharing the views is the handsome formal dining room, with a deep tray ceiling, chandelier, and elegant built-in cabinets. With Saltillo tile floors and SubZero and Viking amenities, the spacious kitchen/family room invites gourmet preparations as well as casual gatherings. Just out the door is a private, gated stairway to the beach. Also on the main floor is an en-suite bedroom as well as a powder room and laundry. Around a lovely piano alcove and sitting area, the grand skylight staircase ascends to the bedroom level. Here, in addition to the primary suite and two other bedrooms, there is a luxurious apartment complete with living room, fireplace, kitchenette, full bath, and separate entrance with a balcony just outside. Perfect for a home office, guest suite, or family room. The ocean-view primary suite is a serene sanctuary. Its gracious living/sitting room with fireplace and tranquil sleeping quarters each feature enormous windows facing the view, while the full-width deck is the perfect spot for whale watching and star gazing. Ascend one more flight to reach the third-floor sunroom and approximately 2000 square foot rooftop deck, where unobstructed views take in the ocean, coastline, and protected landscape of the Santa Monica Mountains National Recreation Area. This living/dining/lounging area is fully equipped with a fire pit and outdoor kitchen for incomparable day and evening gatherings. An estate of rare quality and value, with a protective sea wall and dramatic grandeur, the property offers easy access to the Camarillo Airport, Pepperdine University, central Malibu, and all the luxuries of California coastal living. Rare opportunity to purchase the adjoining flat 1.2-acre lot that offers an additional 125 feet of frontage and the exceedingly rare opportunity to create a 1.5-acre custom oceanfront estate with guesthouse and pool, or build a new 10,000 square foot dream home with plans by Doug Burdge, Malibu's number one architect.
